meta.title: Orange Cloud — Your Cloudflare, at a glance
meta.description: A native client for Cloudflare: official OAuth sign-in, domains, DNS, traffic analytics, live Workers logs and R2 · D1 · KV storage on iPhone, iPad and Android.

productHunt.alt: Orange Cloud — the open-source Cloudflare companion for power users | Product Hunt

hero.sub: Domains, DNS, analytics, Workers logs and storage, set in a sky that follows the time of day. Official OAuth sign-in — no API token pasting.
hero.note: iOS 17.0+ / Android 9+ · Free download, optional Pro

trust.title: Sign in without handing over keys
trust.sub: No data collection, no servers in between — a console that belongs to you alone.

cards.b: Official Cloudflare OAuth 2.0 + PKCE. Pick exactly the scopes you want, revoke any time from the dashboard.
Credentials are stored only in your device's Keychain — never uploaded, never on third-party servers.
Every request goes straight to api.cloudflare.com. This site only relays the OAuth callback and stores nothing.

gallery.title: Swipe from dawn to midnight
gallery.sub: Eight screens share one continuous sky — swipe right and the sun walks the day for you.
alts: Overview: domains, Workers, DNS and usage on one screen
Analytics: requests, bandwidth, cache hits and threats
Light and dark: one sky, day and night
Home Screen widgets that follow the sky

features.title: The whole Cloudflare toolkit, in your palm
features.sub: From DNS to edge storage, every daily move is covered.

items.b: Create, edit and delete records, with a one-tap proxy toggle and quick search.
Requests, bandwidth, cache hits and blocked threats, drawn with Swift Charts.
Direct WebSocket tail, streamed into Dynamic Island and Live Activities.
Browse objects, run SQL, manage key-value pairs — one Storage tab for all three.
Inspect and toggle firewall rules when it matters most.
Tunnel status and active connections at a glance.
Home Screen widgets that follow the sky, shortcuts one phrase away.
Keep several Cloudflare accounts side by side and switch in a tap.

ipad.title: Two columns, built for iPad
ipad.body: A NavigationSplitView layout keeps list and detail side by side — the big screen is no longer a stretched-out phone.

pro.title: Free where it counts, Pro where it scales
pro.sub: Core management is free forever. Power features come with Pro — subscribe, or buy once and keep it.
pro.note: Orange Cloud is open source (AGPL-3.0) — you can also build it yourself.

cta.title: Put Cloudflare in your pocket
cta.sub: Tonight's sky is already waiting in the app.
cta.requirement: Requires iOS 17.0+ or Android 9+ · iPhone, iPad & Android

changelog.title: Release history
changelog.sub: Orange Cloud is now on the App Store. Here's the release history — or join TestFlight for early access to upcoming builds.
changelog.tfNote: Requires iOS 17.0 or later · Apple devices only
changelog.androidSoon: The Android app is coming soon to Google Play

footer.disclaimer: Orange Cloud is an independent third-party client and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Cloudflare, Inc. Cloudflare is a trademark of Cloudflare, Inc.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.intro: A question, some feedback, or a bug to report? Email the developer directly — we read every message.
contact.emailHint: We reply as soon as we can, usually within a few days.

cards.p: Tell us what works, what doesn't, and what you'd like to see next.
Hit something broken? Steps to reproduce and your device info help us track it down.
Found a security issue? Email us the details and we'll respond promptly.

sections.p: Orange Cloud does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data to our servers. Your Cloudflare OAuth tokens are stored exclusively in your device's local Keychain. All API requests are sent directly to api.cloudflare.com.

Orange Cloud uses Cloudflare's official OAuth 2.0 authorization flow. We never see or store your Cloudflare password or permanent API tokens. The OAuth callback endpoint on this site forwards the temporary authorization code to the app without storing it.
Orange Cloud communicates exclusively with Cloudflare's official API endpoints (api.cloudflare.com and dash.cloudflare.com). No other third-party services are used.
By using Orange Cloud, you agree to these terms. Orange Cloud is an independent third-party client for Cloudflare and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Cloudflare, Inc.

Orange Cloud lets you manage your own Cloudflare resources through Cloudflare's official API. You are responsible for all changes made to your Cloudflare account through the app, and for complying with Cloudflare's own terms of service.

Orange Cloud is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of the app, including but not limited to DNS misconfiguration or service interruption.
You can revoke Orange Cloud's access to your Cloudflare account at any time from the Cloudflare Dashboard, or by logging out in the app.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We hit an unexpected error. Please try again.
